extraction.one_line_summary: HIT Jan attacked with 8km remaining on Valle Santa Cristina after teammate BILBAO crashed attacking, dropped HINDLEY/CARAPAS group for solo stage win.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain Victorious attacked via BILBAO on final climb before leader HIT countered after crash, revealing staged team aggression.
NIBALI attacked on Mortirolo descent despite isolation, testing GC rivals' willingness to chase without team support mid-stage.
INEOS controlled early despite SIVAKOV mechanical, showing depth over individual pink jersey protection in final week.
ALMEIDA intentionally limited effort on final climb managing 15-second loss, signaling longer-range GC calculation over daily placement.

rider_signals.HIT Jan: positive: Solo'd final 8km Valle Santa Cristina after teammate crash disrupted group dynamics, showing opportunistic timing.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Attacked Mortirolo alone without support, lost nearly minute when isolated, exposing Astana's numerical weakness.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: Deliberately paced final climb losing only 15 seconds, suggesting management rather than weakness with three-second GC gap.
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: negative: Crashed while attacking for BILBAO Mikel, creating chaos that teammate HIT exploited for stage win.
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Gained four bonus seconds via photo finish despite losing stage, moved from seven to three seconds off pink.
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Required running repairs and massive chase effort on penultimate climb, vulnerability for pink jersey defense.
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: Present early Mortirolo but dropped final climb, showed climbing form deteriorating in third week.
